title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3.2, Mistral, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; identical surface to the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration that wraps Ollama endpoints for chat, embeddings, and tool-calling.

title: ollama-webui (Ollama-WebUI)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, model manager, multi-user, dark mode).

title: ollama-cli (rich TUI)
summary: Terminal dashboard for Ollama with model search, chat history, and progress bars.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing local LLM code completion via Ollama.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama4j
summary: Unofficial Java client for Ollama (Spring-friendly) with async & streaming support.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama; same API shape as Python/JS clients.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models for generative QA and embeddings pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes: RAG, function-calling, fine-tune, Docker Compose, GPU tips.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-host Discord bot that chats in servers using any Ollama model.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Nim client for Ollama with async HTTP and SSE streaming.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module to pull, run, and query Ollama models inside CI pipelines.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Unofficial Rust crate wrapping Ollama REST endpoints with Tokio streaming.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET SDK for Ollama supporting chat, completion, and embeddings with IAsyncEnumerable streaming.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds Ollama-powered summarization and Q&A commands.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Lightweight Slack bot server that forwards channel messages to Ollama and posts replies.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir OTP client for Ollama with GenServer and streaming via HTTPoison.
